zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Sherman於1490年8月10日出生在英國素福爾可亞可利時，他的父親Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley25歲，母親Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley20歲。他於1512年與Jane Waller在英國英格蘭素福爾可亞可利結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1551年11月16日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可亞可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Sherman于1490年8月10日出生在英国素福爾可亞可利时，他的父亲Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley25岁，母亲Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley20岁。他于1512年与Jane Waller在英国英格兰素福爾可亞可利结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1551年11月16日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可亞可利。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Sherman was born on 10 August 1490, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley, was 25 and his mother, Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, was 20. He married Jane Waller in 1512, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 November 1551, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Sherman est né le 10 août 1490, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jane Waller en 1512, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1551, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Sherman am 10. August 1490 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley 25 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley 20. Er hat 1512 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Jane Waller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. November 1551 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yaxley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sherman è nato il il 10 agosto 1490 nel Yaxley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jane Waller nel 1512, nel Yaxley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1551, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Shermanが1490年8月10日にイギリススフォルクヤクスリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxleyは25歳，母Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxleyは20歳であった。1512年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヤクスリーでJane Wallerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1551年11月16日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヤクスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Sherman(이)가 1490년 8월 10일 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 야스리에서 Jane Waller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1551년 11월 16일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 야스리에 묻혔다.

pt.10 August 1490–16 November 1551: 10 de agosto de 1490–16 de novembro de 1551
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sherman nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1490, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Waller em 1512, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1551, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Sherman родился 10 августа 1490 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Waller в 1512 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 ноября 1551 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия.

es.10 August 1490–16 November 1551: 10 de agosto de 1490–16 de noviembre de 1551
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Sherman nació el 10 de agosto de 1490, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jane Waller en 1512, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1551, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
